description_long: This humanoid robot features a boxy, angular design with a rectangular torso, articulated limbs, and a square head. The head includes a display screen with simple facial graphics and what appears to be a small antenna or sensor on top. Its arms and legs are segmented with visible joints, allowing for a wide range of motion, and the hands are stylized with three fingers each. The chest area displays a circular emblem or interface, while the back has a panel with grid-like detailing. The robot's color palette is primarily light gray with darker gray and blue accents on the hands and feet. The overall construction suggests a utilitarian, urban-friendly design suitable for interaction in public spaces.
description: A light gray, boxy humanoid robot with a display face, articulated limbs, and blue-accented hands and feet. It features a chest emblem and a grid-detailed back panel.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's display face, chest emblem, and both arms extended, with one hand raised in a gesture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the segmented arm and leg joints, the profile of the head, and the protruding chest and back panels.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the grid-detailed back panel, the back of the head, and the alignment of the limbs.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the arm and leg articulation, the side of the head, and the angular body profile.
attribute_pose: The robot is in a dynamic walking pose with one leg forward and one arm raised, as if gesturing or greeting. The head is upright, and the torso is slightly angled.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed, featuring only integrated panels and mechanical coverings with no additional clothing or decorative elements.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of a display screen showing simple graphical facial features, such as eyes and a mouth, with no physical nose or expressive mechanical parts.
attribute_limb_articulation: The robot has articulated arms and legs with visible hinge and rotary joints at the shoulders, elbows, wrists, hips, knees, and ankles. The hands have three articulated fingers each.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible sensors include a display screen on the head (likely with an integrated camera or visual sensor) and a possible sensor or antenna on top of the head.
